features.name: LHS concatenation of bit slices from same 2D array element
features.description: Code should include a concatenation on the left-hand side of an assignment where the concatenated parts are adjacent bit slices of the same 2D unpacked array element, such as {arr[i][j+1], arr[i][j]} = expr

features.name: parameterized 2D memory array with multiplied port width
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array (memory) where the port width is the product of two parameters (DIM_1*DIM_2), and the memory is indexed with parameter-based part-select using +: operator

features.name: nested for loops with non-unit stride on array indices
features.description: Code should include nested for-loops iterating over a 2D unpacked array where the outer loop uses a non-unit stride (e.g., i=i+3) and the inner loop iterates over bit indices of each array element
features.snippet:
for (i = 0; i < DIM_2-1; i=i+3) begin
  for (j = 0; j < DIM_1-1; j=j+1) begin
    mem[i][j+1] = mem[i][j] + mem[i+1][j];
  end
end

features.name: array copy between two 2D memories in combinational block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block that copies elements from one 2D unpacked array to another element-by-element using a for loop, combined with a second block performing array-to-vector packing
